_readme: Per-game manifest and richer source of truth (games.json in the repo root is the lean hub registry that mirrors a subset of this). JSON has no comments, so every field is explained by an adjacent "_comment_<field>" key — delete those before shipping. Fill in every real field, keep ids kebab-case and lowercase, keep all paths relative.
_comment_id: kebab-case, lowercase, unique. Becomes the folder name games/<id>/ and the games.json id.
_comment_title: Human-friendly display name shown in the hub. An emoji is welcome.
title: Game Family Template
_comment_category: One of the 10 kebab-case category ids (see docs/categories.md): reading-phonics, writing-fine-motor, math-number-sense, practical-life, sensorial-science, oral-storytelling, culture-geography, art-music, movement-outdoor, social-emotional.
_comment_path: Relative path to the game folder from the repo root. Always games/<id>/.
_comment_icon: Hub tile icon: an emoji, or a relative path to a PNG inside this game folder.
_comment_age: Target age band. Platform default is 5–6.
_comment_status: in-design | proposed | live | archived. New games start in-design.
_comment_accent: Hex accent color for this game's hub tile and UI. Match css --accent.
_comment_uses: Shared library paths this game consumes, relative to the repo root. Helps reviewers see the footprint. See docs/asset-system.md.
_comment_modes: One entry per mini-game mode. Each teaches ONE skill and runs a 30–90s loop. id must match the data-mode on the menu button and the case in main.js.

modes.title: Mode A
modes.skill: the one skill Mode A practices

modes.title: Mode B
modes.skill: the one skill Mode B practices

_comment_description: One or two warm sentences for parents. What does a kid do and learn?
description: A starter game family. Replace this with a short, warm description of what your child taps, builds, or discovers.
_comment_learningGoals: 3–5 concrete goals. See the game-design.md Learning goals section.
_comment_interactionModel: How the child interacts: tap, drag, match, sort, trace, pour, tilt... Keep it touch-first, min 96px targets.
_comment_feedbackModel: How success, retry, hint and celebration feel. Never punishment — repeat with variation instead.
feedbackModel: Warm voice praise + sound-effect sparkle on success; gentle re-prompt with a hint on a miss; no failure states.
_comment_license: Code is MIT; original assets/docs are CC BY 4.0. Leave as-is unless a mode ships third-party assets (log those in this game's ASSETS.md).
_comment_entry: Relative path to the game's HTML entry point.
_comment_credits: People and tools to thank. Free text or a short list.
credits: Built with Claude Code for QLOBE Kids.
_comment_characters: Any shared or original characters featured (from shared/characters/ or this game). Empty if none.
_comment_conceptVideo: Optional. A relative path to concept/*.mp4 (<=15MB) or an external URL. Empty string if none.
